name: Incumbent of the Abyss
text:
Flying
When Incumbent of the Abyss enters the battlefield, target opponent's incumbent — the creature with the greatest power they control — gets -3/-3 until end of turn. There can only be one candidate for the end of days.
Whenever an opponent's election or vote resolves, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
flavorText: Term limits do not apply below sea level.

extras.interaction: targets the opponent's biggest creature / reacts to elections
